title: fix(gen): use ImageUrl struct for xAI video I2V requests
author: fisventurous

gist.headline: xAI Video: Now with 100% more structs
gist.blurb: Fixed a tiny hiccup where xAI video generation was getting confused by our image URLs. Image-to-video is back to running smoothly!
gist.summary: Fixed a bug in the xAI video model integration where image-to-video requests were failing with a 422 error due to an incorrect payload structure.
gist.impact: Users can once again successfully generate videos from images using the xAI model without encountering API rejections.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about fixing a structural issue (wrapping a string in a struct/box) for video generation. Polly the Bee putting a picture (image URL) into a neat little box (struct) and handing it to the Monitor Robot (video generator) who is now happy.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot carefully placing a tiny pixelated photograph into a neat little lime green (#ecf874) box, handing it to a chunky monitor-head robot who looks thrilled. A retro film projector sits in the background. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
